mapper.update: UPDATE chemical_stock SET total_quantity = COALESCE(total_quantity, 0) + #{inQuantity}, available_quantity = COALESCE(available_quantity, 0) + #{inQuantity}, last_in_date = CURDATE(), status = CASE WHEN COALESCE(available_quantity, 0) + #{inQuantity} <= 0 THEN 'out_of_stock' WHEN COALESCE(safety_stock, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(available_quantity, 0) + #{inQuantity} < COALESCE(safety_stock, 0) THEN 'low_stock' ELSE 'active' END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
